name: Hacker News: Submit Root Comment
summary: Post a root-level Hacker News comment on a chosen item (or the current top story if no URL is supplied), with a dedupe guard and an explicit approval gate.
description: Open a Hacker News item (specific URL or first front-page item if item_url is omitted), scroll to read context, draft a root-level comment, pause for explicit operator approval, and submit only after the operator clicks Continue. Hard-fails if the same logged-in account already posted the same comment text on this thread. To dry-run, click Stop at the approval gate — the comment textarea stays filled.

comment_text.description: Root comment to post. Should add context, not repeat the linked content. The workflow refuses to submit if the same account has already posted this exact text on the thread.

item_url.description: Full URL of the HN item, e.g. https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=12345678. Omit to comment on whatever is currently the first item on the front page.

steps.name: Land on HN front page (cheap; same origin as any item URL)

target.selector: tr.athing td.subtext a[href^='item?id='], tr.athing + tr td.subtext a[href^='item?id=']

steps.name: Wait for the front page item table

inputs.script: const cleanArg = (value) => { const text = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(text) ? '' : text; }; const itemUrl = cleanArg(arg0); let target; let source; if (itemUrl) { try { const u = new URL(itemUrl, 'https://news.ycombinator.com/'); if (!/(^|\.)ycombinator\.com$/i.test(u.hostname)) throw new Error('item_url must be on news.ycombinator.com'); target = u.href; source = 'param'; } catch (e) { throw new Error('Invalid item_url: ' + e.message); } } else { const link = document.querySelector("tr.athing + tr td.subtext a[href^='item?id='], td.subtext a[href^='item?id=']"); if (!link) throw new Error('No first front-page item link found'); target = new URL(link.getAttribute('href'), 'https://news.ycombinator.com/').href; source = 'front_page_first'; } if (window.location.href === target) return { redirected: false, target, source }; setTimeout(() => window.location.assign(target), 0); return { redirected: true, target, source };

steps.name: Resolve target item URL (use item_url if provided, else first front-page item) and redirect
Wait for the item page to mount

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(value)=>{const text=String(value==null?'':value).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(text)?'':text;}; const normalize=(value)=>String(value||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase(); const expected=normalize(cleanArg(arg0)); if(!expected) throw new Error('comment_text is required'); const currentUser=String(document.querySelector('#me')?.textContent||'').trim(); const rows=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('tr.athing.comtr')); const matches=rows.map((row)=>({ user:String(row.querySelector('.hnuser')?.textContent||'').trim(), text:normalize(row.querySelector('.commtext')?.textContent||'') })).filter((entry)=>entry.user===currentUser&&entry.text===expected); if(matches.length){ throw new Error(`Duplicate HN comment already exists for user ${currentUser||'unknown'}`); } return { current_user: currentUser || null, duplicate_found: false, scanned_comment_count: rows.length };

steps.name: Fail if the same account already posted the same root comment

inputs.script: const box = document.querySelector("form[action='comment'] textarea[name='text'], textarea[name='text']"); const value = box && 'value' in box ? String(box.value || '').trim() : ''; if (!value) { throw new Error('Comment textarea is empty'); } return { draft_length: value.length };

steps.name: Verify the drafted comment is non-empty

inputs.message: HN root comment draft is ready. Click Continue only if you want to post it. Click Stop to leave it as a draft.
inputs.instructions: If this feels repetitive, low-context, or too promotional, click Stop instead of Continue.

steps.name: Pause for approval before submitting the comment
Wait for the comment to post

help.summary: Post a root-level Hacker News comment on a chosen item (or the current top story if no URL is supplied), with a dedupe guard and an explicit approval gate.

parameters.comment_text: Root comment to post. Should add context, not repeat the linked content. The workflow refuses to submit if the same account has already posted this exact text on the thread.
parameters.item_url: Full URL of the HN item, e.g. https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=12345678. Omit to comment on whatever is currently the first item on the front page.

examples.description: Comment on a specific HN item
examples.command: rzn-browser run hn submit-comment --param item_url="https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=12345678" --param comment_text="Section 4 misses cold-start cost — adding it flips the latency story."

examples.description: Comment on whatever is currently the top story (no item_url)
examples.command: rzn-browser run hn submit-comment --param comment_text="Counterpoint: the benchmark in Table 2 excludes warm-cache reads."

examples.description: Dry-run on the top story (click Stop at the approval gate to leave the textarea filled without posting)
examples.command: rzn-browser run hn submit-comment --param comment_text="Test draft — DO NOT APPROVE"

returns: current_user, scanned_comment_count, and draft_length captured before the gate; on submit, the workflow waits for the post to land but does not return the new comment id (read it from the rendered tree if needed).
notes: Caller must already be logged into Hacker News in the active browser profile.
Dedupe guard compares normalised whitespace + lowercase against existing comments by the same logged-in user on the same thread.
When item_url is omitted, the workflow reads the first .athing row on news.ycombinator.com/. The 'first item' is whatever HN serves at that moment — this is intentional, not a bug.
The approval gate uses request_user_intervention with no timeout. Click Continue (submit) or Stop (leave as draft).
